# BP-79 negative variant: renamed local cancellation function is deferred
lang: go
file: BP-79-variant-safe.go
variant: renamed-cancel
---
package sample

import "context"

// Derive derives a context and releases its renamed cancellation function.
func Derive(parent context.Context) context.Context {
	ctx, stop := context.WithCancel(parent)
	defer stop()
	return ctx
}
